title: Multiple style options for connect boards
excerpt: We had a version of a connect board column created for our account but unfortunately it only does a one way link. We like the look and style of this one better and would like it to be a permanent choice to have a connect…

posts.author: rbeckwith (Rachel)
posts.cookedHtml:
We had a version of a connect board column created for our account but unfortunately it only does a one way link. We like the look and style of this one better and would like it to be a permanent choice to have a connect board column styled this way.

image714×723 21.1 KB

posts.author: burstfadehc (Burst Fade Haircuts)
posts.cookedHtml: Connect boards offer diverse style options, including modern, rustic, industrial, and minimalist designs. Styles range from sleek finishes to natural wood aesthetics, providing versatility for various preferences and interior themes.

posts.author: rbeckwith (Rachel)
posts.cookedHtml:
That is the incorrect picture. This style is what I would like to see.
